_comment: External MCP servers bridged into the LLM tool catalog (PROTOCOL_V2 §6.5). Pass with -mcp-config. Each server's tools are exposed to the LLM namespaced mcp__<name>__<tool> and dispatched server-side. A server that fails to start is logged and skipped, never fatal.

servers._comment: HTTP transport example (commented intent — remove to use): a remote MCP endpoint.
servers.name: example-remote
